pages.text: $(li)$(italic)Create: Connected$() — quality-of-life blocks 'you wish Create already had': handy hatches, extra cogs and shafts, copy/paste helpers, and small conveniences across the mod.$(li)$(italic)Create: Vibrant Vaults$() — more $(bold)Item Vault$() material variants, so bulk storage can match your build instead of always reading as brass.
pages.title: QoL & Vaults
